name: Fast Auto Loans, Inc.
description_short: Fast Auto Loans, Inc. Phoenix, AZ — Fast Auto Loans, Inc. offers title loans up to $15,000 and registration loans using vehicle collateral, with same-da...
description_long:
Fast Auto Loans, Inc. is an Arizona-based title and registration loan lender operating multiple locations including Phoenix, Mesa, and Glendale. The company specializes in vehicle-collateral loans designed to provide emergency cash for unexpected expenses, medical bills, or urgent financial needs. They position themselves as a fast alternative to traditional lenders for consumers who need immediate funds.

The company offers two primary loan products: title loans ranging from $300 to $15,000 for borrowers with lien-free vehicles, and registration loans up to $2,500 for those with financed vehicles. Both loan types require no credit check, allow borrowers to keep and drive their vehicles during repayment, and feature expedited approval processes (often 30 minutes). The application process combines online submission with in-store completion, requiring vehicle inspection and standard documentation (driver's license, vehicle title or registration, and proof of income for registration loans).

Fast Auto Loans differentiates itself through local presence and accessibility—their Baseline Road location in Phoenix is positioned near major retail landmarks (Food City, Family Dollar) and serves South Phoenix communities. They emphasize quick approvals, friendly service from local specialists, and the ability to borrow against vehicles with outstanding loans (registration loans). Their website provides transparent FAQ sections and detailed process breakdowns, suggesting consumer education as a marketing priority.

However, the profile reveals critical limitations typical of title lending. The website does not disclose interest rates, fees, or repayment terms—essential information for consumers evaluating cost. Title loans inherently carry high risk of vehicle repossession if payments are missed, and the lack of rate transparency suggests potentially predatory pricing. Registration loans cap at $900-$2,500, limiting their utility for larger emergencies. No information is provided about APR, which typically ranges 100-300% for such products. The company's silence on rates and terms is the most significant consumer protection concern.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same-day or next-day funding available with in-person visits
No credit check required; approval based on vehicle value and condition
Can borrow $300–$15,000 with title loans, significantly more than payday alternatives
Registration loans available for vehicles with outstanding loans/liens
Borrowers keep and drive their vehicle during repayment period
Multiple Arizona locations for local, in-person service and vehicle inspection
Online application option allowing remote start to the process
cons: Website does not disclose interest rates, APR, or fee schedules—essential cost information is missing
High-risk collateral structure: vehicle repossession possible if payments are missed
Registration loans capped at $900–$2,500, limiting utility for larger emergencies
Requires lien-free title or active vehicle registration; excludes consumers with certain vehicle situations
No mention of financial hardship options, forbearance, or alternative repayment plans
best_for: Consumers with owned or nearly-paid vehicles needing $1,000–$5,000 in emergency funds
People with poor or no credit history unable to access traditional personal loans
South Phoenix, Mesa, Glendale residents needing same-day local service and in-person inspection
Individuals facing unexpected medical bills, urgent repairs, or short-term cash gaps
diagnosis: Fast Auto Loans is best for consumers with vehicle collateral and poor credit who need emergency cash within hours or days and can afford higher-than-standard interest rates. The critical caveat is that interest rates, APR, and fees are not disclosed on the website—prospective borrowers must contact the company directly to understand true cost before borrowing, and should carefully evaluate whether vehicle repossession risk justifies the speed and accessibility of these loans.
services: Registration loans (up to $2,500 for financed vehicles)
Online title loan applications and remote pre-qualification
In-store title loan applications and same-day closings
Same-day or next-day funding upon approval
Multi-location service across Phoenix, Mesa, and Glendale
Required documentation guidance (license, title, proof of income)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
